tone: empathetic and trustworthy — this is a sensitive sector, don't come in hot
sentence_length: medium — give enough context to build trust, but stay scannable
cta_style: low-pressure — suggest a conversation to 'explore fit', not close a sale
avoid: I hope this email finds you well
sender_persona: a marketing partner who works exclusively with home health and elder care agencies
service_description: referral-quality outreach campaigns that connect home health agencies with adult children actively searching for care options for a parent
pain_point: hospital discharge planners and word-of-mouth can only fill so many slots — agencies that grow consistently are reaching families earlier in the search process
cta_text: Would a brief conversation to see if there's a fit make sense? I'm happy to work around your schedule.
